content.hint: 表示主动跟进后续事项的常用短语
content.situation: 在结束一次商务会议后，对方表示感谢并期待后续合作，你需要礼貌回应并表达会主动跟进。
content.speakerText: Thanks for your time today — I really appreciate the insights you shared.
content.speakerTextCn: 感谢你今天的时间，非常感谢你分享的见解。
content.knowledgePoint: 表达主动跟进的礼貌用语
content.responseTemplate: It was my pleasure. I'll ___ on the next steps and reach out soon.

content.hint: 表示‘一早’或‘第一时间’的常用搭配
content.template: I’ll review it ___ thing tomorrow. Thanks for your patience and flexibility!
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：first thing（第一时间）
